sentences.target: J'épargne chaque mois pour les vacances.

translations.fr: J'épargne chaque mois pour les vacances.
translations.en: I save every month for vacation.
translations.es: Ahorro cada mes para las vacaciones.
translations.de: Ich spare jeden Monat für den Urlaub.
translations.it: Risparmio ogni mese per le vacanze.
translations.zh-Hans: 我每个月都为度假存钱。
translations.yue: 我每個月都為度假儲錢。
translations.ru: Я каждый месяц откладываю на отпуск.
translations.pt: Eu economizo todo mês para as férias.
translations.tr: Tatil için her ay para biriktiriyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi tiết kiệm mỗi tháng để đi nghỉ.
translations.ar: أدخر كل شهر من أجل الإجازة.
translations.nl: Ik spaar elke maand voor de vakantie.
translations.hi: मैं छुट्टियों के लिए हर महीने बचत करता हूँ।
translations.el: Αποταμιεύω κάθε μήνα για τις διακοπές.
translations.nb: Jeg sparer hver måned til ferien.
translations.id: Saya menabung setiap bulan untuk liburan.
translations.sv: Jag sparar varje månad till semestern.
translations.ro: Economisesc în fiecare lună pentru vacanță.
translations.cs: Každý měsíc si šetřím na dovolenou.
translations.da: Jeg sparer op hver måned til ferie.
translations.ja: 毎月、休暇のために貯金しています。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel; marks the 1st person singular subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses the action of saving (money).
Invariable determiner quantifying the noun ‘mois’ (‘each’).
Common noun; head of the temporal NP modified by ‘chaque’, indicating frequency.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary complement (‘les vacances’).
Definite article in plural; determiner of ‘vacances’.
Plural-only common noun; object of the preposition ‘pour’ indicating intended use (for holidays).

sentences.target: On doit épargner un peu ce trimestre.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa epaʁɲe œ̃ pø sə tʁimɛstʁ/

translations.fr: On doit épargner un peu ce trimestre.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa epaʁɲe œ̃ pø sə tʁimɛstʁ/
translations.en: We have to save a bit this quarter.
translations.es: Tenemos que ahorrar un poco este trimestre.
translations.de: Wir müssen dieses Quartal ein bisschen sparen.
translations.it: Dobbiamo risparmiare un po' questo trimestre.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个季度我们得省一点钱。
translations.yue: 呢個季度我哋要慳啲錢。
translations.ru: В этом квартале нам нужно немного сэкономить.
translations.pt: Temos que economizar um pouco neste trimestre.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לחסוך קצת ברבעון הזה.
translations.tr: Bu çeyrekte biraz tasarruf etmemiz gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải tiết kiệm một chút trong quý này.
translations.ar: علينا أن نوفر قليلاً هذا الربع.
translations.nl: We moeten dit kwartaal een beetje besparen.
translations.uk: Цього кварталу нам треба трохи заощадити.
translations.hu: Ebben a negyedévben egy kicsit spórolnunk kell.
translations.hi: इस तिमाही हमें थोड़ा बचत करनी होगी।
translations.pl: W tym kwartale musimy trochę zaoszczędzić.
translations.el: Πρέπει να αποταμιεύσουμε λίγο αυτό το τρίμηνο.
translations.nb: Vi må spare litt dette kvartalet.
translations.id: Kita harus menabung sedikit pada kuartal ini.
translations.sv: Vi måste spara lite det här kvartalet.
translations.ro: Trebuie să economisim puțin trimestrul acesta.
translations.da: Vi skal spare lidt i dette kvartal.
translations.fi: Tänä neljänneksenä meidän pitää säästää vähän.
translations.ja: 今四半期は少し節約しないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject; agrees as 3rd person singular with the verb.
Modal auxiliary in present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses obligation and selects the infinitive ‘épargner’.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of the modal ‘doit’.
Indefinite article forming the set phrase ‘un peu’.
Adverb in the fixed expression ‘un peu’; adverbial modifier indicating small degree/quantity of the action.
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘trimestre’ (‘this’).
Temporal noun; head of the NP setting the timeframe (‘this quarter’).

sentences.target: Tu épargnes pour acheter une voiture.

translations.fr: Tu épargnes pour acheter une voiture.
translations.en: You're saving to buy a car.
translations.es: Estás ahorrando para comprar un coche.
translations.de: Du sparst, um ein Auto zu kaufen.
translations.pt: Você está economizando para comprar um carro.
translations.tr: Bir araba almak için para biriktiriyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn đang tiết kiệm để mua xe hơi.
translations.nl: Je spaart om een auto te kopen.
translations.hi: तुम कार खरीदने के लिए बचत कर रहे हो।
translations.nb: Du sparer for å kjøpe bil.
translations.sv: Du sparar för att köpa en bil.
translations.ro: Economisești ca să cumperi o mașină.
translations.da: Du sparer op for at købe en bil.
translations.ja: 車を買うために貯金している。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun; controls agreement on the verb.
Finite main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; denotes the action of saving.
Preposition marking purpose; introduces the infinitival clause.
Infinitive verb as complement of ‘pour’; expresses the intended goal of saving.
Indefinite article; determiner of ‘voiture’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘acheter’.

sentences.target: Épargne-moi les détails, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /epaʁɲ mwa le de.taj sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Épargne-moi les détails, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /epaʁɲ mwa le de.taj sil tə plɛ/
translations.pt: Me poupe dos detalhes, por favor.
translations.vi: Làm ơn đừng kể chi tiết.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, не вдавайся в подробиці.
translations.hi: कृपया मुझे विवरणों से बख्श दो।
translations.nb: Spar meg detaljene, vær så snill.
translations.ja: 詳しい話は勘弁してください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; main predicate issuing a command (‘Spare...’).
Tonic/clitic pronoun placed after the imperative; indirect object (recipient) of ‘Épargne’.
Definite article in plural; determiner of ‘détails’.
Plural common noun; direct object of ‘Épargne’ (‘spare me the details’).
Subordinating conjunction ‘si’ (‘if’) with elision before a vowel; introduces the polite formula.
Subject pronoun of ‘plaît’ in the subordinate clause (‘if it pleases...’).
Second-person singular clitic pronoun; indirect object of ‘plaît’.
Finite verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; part of the fixed polite expression ‘s’il te plaît’ (‘please’).

jp: J'épargne chaque mois pour les vacances.
On doit épargner un peu ce trimestre.
Tu épargnes pour acheter une voiture.
Épargne-moi les détails, s'il te plaît.
fu: /ɔ̃ dwa epaʁɲe œ̃ pø sə tʁimɛstʁ/
/epaʁɲ mwa le de.taj sil tə plɛ/
fr: J'épargne chaque mois pour les vacances.
On doit épargner un peu ce trimestre.
Tu épargnes pour acheter une voiture.
Épargne-moi les détails, s'il te plaît.
ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa epaʁɲe œ̃ pø sə tʁimɛstʁ/
/epaʁɲ mwa le de.taj sil tə plɛ/
en: I save every month for vacation.
We have to save a bit this quarter.
You're saving to buy a car.
